title: zanthoxylum rigidum subsp. rigidum
intro: Zanthoxylum rigidum subsp. rigidum, also known as the Mexican Prickly Ash, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family that is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to relieve pain and reduce inflammation, which is attributed to the presence of compounds like limonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum rigidum subsp. rigidum include its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues, fever reduction, and relief from muscle and joint pain. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
